# Yourself to Science - Full Dataset
Generated on: 2026-04-11

This list contains 56 active platforms and initiatives.

### Living DNA Global Research Project
- **Operating Organization(s):** Living DNA
- **Category:** Commercial (Commercial)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome, Health data
- **Website:** https://support.livingdna.com/hc/en-us/articles/360012326740-How-do-I-participate-in-research

**Description:** A research project by Living DNA to map the world's genetic history and investigate the role genetics plays in health and lifestyle. Participants can opt-in to use their genetic data for scientific research.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---

### GenomeConnect
- **Operating Organization(s):** Clinical Genome Resource (ClinGen)
- **Category:** Non-Profit (Research Project)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome, Health data
- **Website:** https://www.genomeconnect.org/

**Description:** A patient registry engaging individuals as partners in data sharing by collecting genetic testing results and health information. Note: Data from participants in the European Union (EU), European Economic Area (EEA), and United Kingdom (UK) cannot currently be processed due to GDPR. They accept electronic (pdf, doc, jpg) or physical clinical reports but they do not process raw data files.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---

### Open Humans
- **Operating Organization(s):** Open Humans Foundation
- **Category:** Non-Profit (Research Foundation)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome, Health data, Wearable data, Search history, Location history
- **Website:** https://www.openhumans.org/add-data/

**Description:** A platform for participant-centered research and personal data exploration.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---

### FamilyTreeDNA Group Projects
- **Operating Organization(s):** FamilyTreeDNA
- **Category:** Commercial (Commercial)
- **Countries:** Worldwide
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome
- **Website:** https://www.familytreedna.com/group-project

**Description:** Join thousands of collaborative genealogy projects based on surname, geography, or haplogroup to support citizen science and migration pattern discovery.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

### MyPHD
- **Operating Organization(s):** Stanford University
- **Category:** Academic (Academic)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Health data, Wearable data
- **Website:** https://myphd.stanford.edu/studies/

**Description:** A platform for collecting health data from wearables to detect early signs of infectious diseases.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

### Harvard Personal Genome Project

- **Category:** Academic (University)
- **Countries:** United States
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome, Health data
- **Website:** https://pgp.med.harvard.edu/participate

**Description:** An open science project by Harvard Medical School where participants publicly share their genetic, health, and trait data to drive biological research.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

### Genes for Good
- **Operating Organization(s):** University of Michigan
- **Category:** Academic (University)
- **Countries:** United States
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome, Health data
- **Website:** https://genesforgood.sph.umich.edu/participate

**Description:** A research study run through a Facebook App that connects health, behavior, and genetics. Participants complete surveys and may become eligible to provide a saliva sample for DNA analysis.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

### Cochrane Central Register of Controlled Trials
- **Operating Organization(s):** Cochrane
- **Category:** Non-Profit (Non-Governmental Organization)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Clinical trials
- **Website:** https://www.cochranelibrary.com/central

**Description:** A highly concentrated source of reports of randomized and quasi-randomized controlled trials from various databases and other sources. Access requires a subscription to the Cochrane Library.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

- **Data Types Accepted:** Clinical trials
- **Website:** https://clinicaltrialsdatabase.be/

**Description:** A database of clinical trials approved by the Belgian Federal Agency for Medicines and Health Products (FAMHP). NOTE: This database is no longer available due to changes in the legal framework.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined

- **Data Types Accepted:** Blood, Plasma, Stem cells
- **Website:** https://bloodworksnw.org/donate/research

**Description:** Bloodworks Northwest’s research program accepts blood donations to support a variety of studies, from developing new treatments to understanding blood-related diseases. This service is available in the Pacific Northwest.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

### GEDmatch
- **Operating Organization(s):** Verogen Inc.
- **Category:** Commercial (Commercial)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome
- **Website:** https://www.gedmatch.com/privacy-security/

**Description:** A public genealogy database that allows users to opt-in to share their data for research purposes. Note: VCF files from unsupported companies must be converted to the 23andMe format before upload.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---

### hEDS & Dysautonomia Study (Sequencing.com)
- **Operating Organization(s):** Sequencing.com, Medical University of South Carolina
- **Category:** Commercial (Commercial)
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome
- **Website:** https://get.sequencing.com/research-study/hypermobile-eds-dysautonomia/

**Description:** Participate in a genetic study for hypermobile Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome (hEDS) and Dysautonomia in collaboration with the Norris Lab at the Medical University of South Carolina.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---

### Altruist Database (Sequencing.com)
- **Operating Organization(s):** Sequencing.com
- **Category:** Commercial (Commercial)
- **Countries:** Worldwide
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome
- **Website:** https://sequencing.com/knowledge-center/altruist-endeavor/altruist-database

**Description:** A free database of anonymous genotypic, phenotypic and interpretation data that allows public searching and analysis. Researchers can request to contact individuals holding specific traits for additional paid studies and opportunities.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---

### WikiTree
- **Operating Organization(s):** The WikiTree Company
- **Category:** Commercial (Commercial)
- **Countries:** Worldwide
- **Data Types Accepted:** Genome
- **Website:** https://www.wikitree.com/wiki/Special:DNATests

**Description:** A collaborative genealogy platform that allows users to add their DNA test information (like GEDmatch ID or usernames, rather than raw data files) to their profiles to help confirm relationships and find genetic cousins.

**Metrics:**
- Year Launched: Unknown
- Is Actively Recruiting: undefined
- Has Open API for Researchers: undefined
- Practices Open Data: undefined

---
